name: Banana Granola Bread (Machine) - Regular Loaf
recipeIngredient: 1 teaspoon Yeast, fast rise or machine
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the water, flour, dry milk, salt, and yeast. Mix until smooth.
2. Add the butter, mashed bananas, granola, molasses, walnuts, and banana chips to the dough. Stir until all ingredients are evenly distributed.
3. Pour the mixture into a greased bread machine pan or 9x5 inch loaf pan lined with parchment paper.
4. Cover and let rise in a warm place for about 1 hour, or until doubled in size.
5. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
6. Bake for 30-35 minutes, or until golden brown and the internal temperature reaches 190°F (88°C) when checked with an instant-read thermometer.
7. Remove from the oven and let cool on a wire rack before slicing.
